passive.name: Symbiosis
passive.description:
Selena can switch freely between her two forms.
Elven Form: Selena applies Abyssal Mark when her skills deal damage. Marks lasts 8s and can stack up to 2 times.
Abyssal Form: Selena's Basic Attacks become melee and deal (25% Total Magic Power) additional Magic Damage. Her skills deal 240-450 (+40% Total Magic Power) additional Magic Damage to enemies with Abyssal Mark and consume their mark stacks by 1. This damage is increased to 250% against Creeps and Minions.

skill1.name: Abyssal Trap
skill1.description:
Selena summons an Abyssal Devil to lurk underground. The Abyssal Devil will attach itself to any enemy that approaches, inflicting a stack of
Abyssal Mark and reducing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1s. The Abyssal Devil then explodes, dealing 350 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in the area and reducing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1s.
Each additional Abyssal Devil on an emeny increases the final damage by 50%
Each Abyssal Devil can lurk up to 60s and up to 3 Abyssal Devils can exist at the same time.
|quote=The iron will of the Abyss befalls.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=8.0/7.6/7.2/6.8/6.4/6.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=70/75/80/85/90/95
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=350/390/430/470/510/550

skill2.name: Soul Eater
skill2.description:
Selena strengthens her claws with the power of the Abyss, causing the next basic attack to dash to a target and deal an additional 200 (+130% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage while granting her a 300 (+150% Total Magic Power) shield.
If this damage detonates an Abyssal Mark, Garotte's cooldown will reset.
|quote=The iron will of the Abyss befalls.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=6.0/5.5/5.0/4.5/4.0/3.5
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=200/230/260/290/320/350
|stats3=Base Shield|stats3_value=300/320/340/360/380/400

ultimate.name: Abyssal Arrow
ultimate.description:
Selena fires an abyssal wraith in the target direction that stops when it hits an enemy hero, Creep, or Summon, dealing 250 (+20% Total Magic Power) to 500 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the target hit and stunning them for 0.5s to 2.5s while revealing their locations (the damage and stun duration increase with the wraith's travel distance).
The wraith will pick up Abyssal Trap as it travels over it and will apply the trap to the enemy target upon stunning them.
If the wraith stuns an enemy for 0.9s or longer, Selena will gain 60% Movement Speed for 2s.
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=80/90/100/110/120/130
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=250/280/310/340/370/400
|stats3=Max Damage|stats3_value=500/560/620/680/740/800

extra1.name: Garotte
extra1.description:
Selena charges in the target direction, dealing 150 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in her path.
If this skill's damage detonates an Abyssal Mark, its cooldown will reset
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=12.0/11.4/10.8/10.2/9.6/9.0
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=150/190/230/270/310/350

extra2.name: Primal Darkness
extra2.description:
Passive: Selena gains 5 Magic Power.
Active: Selena enters Abyssal Form and gains 20% Movement Speed for 0.8s. This also immediateky resets the Cooldown of Soul Eater and Garotte.
|stats1=Movement Speed Bonus|stats1_value=20%/30%/40%/50%
|stats2=Magic Power|stats2_value=5/10/15/20

extra3.description:

Active: Selena enters Elven Form and gains 20% Movement Speed for 0.8s. This also immediateky resets the Cooldown of Abyssal Trap and Abyssal Arrow.
